name: Use Old or New Volume Control UI in Windows 10
snippet: This tutorial will show you how to switch to use the old or new volume control for all users in Windows 10.

name: Get the old Windows volume mixer back in Windows 10 - CNET
snippet: Go to Start > All apps > Windows System > Run. Click the speaker icon in your system tray and you should see your old-school Windows mixer.
